'''Vilimia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Velus system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with 13 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="CatCW" />
